name: Content Multiple Assessments Then Successor Pipeline
description: Content workflow with two required assessors before successor publication work.
outcome: A content draft clears multiple specialist assessments before publishing proceeds.

definition.process_instructions: The content strategy lead frames the content change. The feature writer drafts it. The editorial quality assessor and brand risk assessor both review the same subject revision. The publication producer finalizes release packaging only after both assessments approve.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
